name: Expense categories & input reference data
description: Expose immutable expense input reference data as global static catalogs. Backend: public/cacheable GET /api/v1/categories and GET /api/v1/sources served from checked-in code, not household data or user-managed records. Categories return stable `key`, `kind`, `iconUrl`, and `color` metadata; sources return stable keys `cash`, `bank-transfer`, `card`, `e-wallet`, and `other`. Categories are shared by all users and households, cannot be changed by end users, and may only be updated by a system administrator through code changes or DB migration work. Web: ship API layer + hooks + `category-picker` + `source-picker` + component tests only. Per docs/product-specs/expense-categorization.md. Does NOT include Add Expense UI, Quick-add UI, category CRUD, or any category default/recent/last-used logic.
